reference_tool: Deltek Acumen Fuse (Workbook1 DCMA / Schedule-Quality report, Project5 status 2026-08-27)
notes: REAL reference-tool parity case (the first one): 'Commercial Construction', latest version (Project5, 145 tasks). Expected values are Acumen Fuse's, so this asserts genuine Acumen parity (unlike simple_network_self, which is a self-regression baseline). Acumen reported the structural checks clean; baseline-finish compliance was poor (~20%), so the baseline-based metrics fail in both tools. input.xml is the MPXJ MSPDI conversion of the source .mpp; the source files are non-CUI reference schedules provided by the data owner (so they are safe to commit). See docs/PARITY.md.

checks.source: Acumen: 6 of 126 non-summary activities missing logic
Acumen: no invalid forecast/actual dates flagged
Acumen: baseline finish compliance ~20% (severe slip from baseline)
Acumen: declining baseline execution (BEI well below 0.95)
